'''Karn Graznor''' was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ship, ''[[Sable II]]''. He was greedy and did not share the booty fairly with his crew. As a result a large portion of his crew, led by [[Drek Drednar]] jumped ship, stole a Corellian corvette, chased him down, and defeated him in a space battle, killing him and destroying the ''Sable II''.
